name: SurveyMonkey NPS Segmenter
description: Captures a SurveyMonkey response, computes the NPS bucket (promoter, passive, or detractor) from the 0-10 score, and routes accordingly. Each branch tags the contact in Mailchimp and writes the score to HubSpot, while detractors also open an Intercom conversation for follow-up. Replaces the manual NPS export-import dance with a live segmentation pipeline.
